steps.title: Identify the effect of unpredictable shifts
steps.content: The passage states that “unpredictable shifts in cloud cover and haze” affect solar energy collection in a way that stored energy can help counteract. We need the word that describes what these shifts do to the collection process.

steps.title: Find the word for that effect
steps.content: When clouds appear unpredictably, solar energy collection rises and falls—it fluctuates. Stored energy mitigates this by providing power when collection dips. “Fluctuations in” directly captures this variable behavior. The other options fail: “developments of” suggests new events rather than variations, “calibrations with” refers to adjusting equipment (unrelated to what clouds do), and “incentives for” means motivations (not a weather consequence). That matches choice B — B is correct.
